calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus (Writs)
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Jeff Lewis, Esq., MARVIN FIRESTONE, MD, JD & ASSOCIATES, LLP., 650-212- 4900, for Plaintiff
Greg Chambers, Esq., Supervising Deputy Attorney General, 415-703-5480, for Defendant (via ZOOM Conference)
Emily Husary, CSR #12148, 707-799-5993, calicsr@yahoo.com, Court reporter

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER MARGARET SALMON'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus (Writs)is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

**After hearing, an order denying petition for writ of mandate is signed.**
